content.text:
You are applying a code migration fix.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/topology/sidebar/storage-cluster/StorageClusterDetails.tsx
Line: 117, 124, 136, 143, 148, 155, 173, 180, 193

Migration rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-descriptionlistterm]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <DescriptionListTerm> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <DescriptionListTerm> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <DescriptionListTerm variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></DescriptionListTerm>
  After:  <DescriptionListTerm variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <DescriptionListTerm> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <DescriptionListTerm><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</DescriptionListTerm>
  After:  <DescriptionListTerm icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</DescriptionListTerm>

Incident context:
  componentName: DescriptionListTerm
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: DescriptionListGroup

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: DescriptionListTerm
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
  (line 117):
  116              <DescriptionListGroup>
  117                <DescriptionListTerm>{t('Name')}</DescriptionListTerm>
  118                <DescriptionListDescription>

  (line 124):

  124                <DescriptionListTerm>{t('Data resiliency')}</DescriptionListTerm>
  125                <DescriptionListDescription>

  (line 136):

  137                <DescriptionListDescription>

  (line 143):

  143                <DescriptionListTerm>{t('Mode')}</DescriptionListTerm>
  144                <DescriptionListDescription>{mode}</DescriptionListDescription>

  (line 148):

  148                <DescriptionListTerm>{t('Version')}</DescriptionListTerm>
  149                <DescriptionListDescription>

  (line 155):

  155                <DescriptionListTerm>{t('Inventory')}</DescriptionListTerm>
  156                <DescriptionListDescription>

  (line 173):

  174                <DescriptionListDescription>

  180                <DescriptionListTerm>{t('Service name')}</DescriptionListTerm>
  181                <DescriptionListDescription className="text-capitalize">

  (line 193):

  194                  {t('Storage efficiency')}


```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/topology/sidebar/storage-cluster/StorageClusterDetails.tsx
2. Apply ONLY the change described by the migration rule at or near line 117, 124, 136, 143, 148, 155, 173, 180, 193
3. Make the minimum edit necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your change (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Write the fixed file
6. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through the fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edit, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists the change you made, or note if the fix was already applied or could not be applied (with a brief reason).
Let me read the file first to understand the full context.

Now let me analyze the situation:

**Migration rule**: In PF v6, icon content in `<DescriptionListTerm>` must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

**Looking at all the flagged lines (117, 124, 136, 143, 148, 155, 173, 180, 193)**: Every single `<DescriptionListTerm>` in this file contains **only text** (translation strings like `{t('Name')}`, `{t('Data resiliency')}`, etc.). None of them contain any icon elements from `@patternfly/react-icons`.

Since there are no icons being passed as children to any `<DescriptionListTerm>`, the migration rule does not actually require any changes to this file. The rule was triggered on these lines because the scanner detected `DescriptionListTerm` usage, but the specific condition (icon content as children) is not present.

## Changes Applied

**No changes needed.** All `<DescriptionListTerm>` instances in this file contain only text children (translation strings like `{t('Name')}`, `{t('Status')}`, etc.). None contain icon elements from `@patternfly/react-icons`, so the migration rule about moving icon content to the `icon` prop does not apply. The file is already correct for PF v6 with respect to this rule.
